name: Short-Term Hedging Exception (30-Day Rule)

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must close the offsetting position by January 30th and maintain the underlying position unhedged for the following 60 days.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A transaction that would otherwise be a constructive sale is disregarded if it is closed within 30 days of the end of the taxable year and the taxpayer holds the original position for 60 days thereafter.
